_description: EXAMPLE Claude Code settings wiring the agentic-tooling hooks. Copy the hooks/ + statusLine blocks into your project's .claude/settings.json and adjust paths/timeouts. DO NOT CHANGE the security hook wiring without updating the tests.
_note: Paths use $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, which Claude Code sets to the project root. Place the .sh scripts at .claude/hooks/ in your project (or update the paths).
